subcodes.first_line: O Samandar! The grace, mercy and loving-kindness of God have encompassed and do encompass thy condition. That which hath been sent down is without parallel [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سمندر فضل و رحمت و عنایت حق شامل احوال تو بوده و هست نازل شده آنچه مثل
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
